commands: uv run --frozen --python 3.12 python -m pytest -q tests/S03/P04_test.py tests/S03/stage_review_test.py tests/S04/P01_test.py tests/S04/P02_test.py tests/S04/P03_test.py tests/S04/P04_test.py tests/S04/stage_review_test.py --junitxml=machine/evidence/S04/STAGE_REVIEW/signed_state_regression.xml
uv run --frozen --python 3.12 python -m abd_acceptance --contract STAGE-REVIEW-S04 --evidence machine/evidence
explicit_unknowns: No OVH host, Cloudflare or Gmail account, API, dashboard, DNS, credential or secret was accessed.
Docker, systemd and cloudflared were not invoked; the new unit is a repository configuration contract only.
OVH 7x24 operation, global Chinese reachability, China mainland reach or acceleration, and end-to-end Access remain unverified.
The static degraded page is not claimed to be automatically wired into a runtime fallback path.
The frozen 10x profile is deterministic engineering input, not observed production traffic or a target-host benchmark.
The 900-second rollback and 60-second ledger recovery objectives are not real OVH RTO/RPO evidence.
No model, market, quote, stake, account or order was selected or executed.
The 30% monthly compounding target remains falsifiable, unverified and not guaranteed; target shortfall cannot relax any gate.
Remote GitHub CI is not claimed by local review evidence and must be observed after whole-stage upload.

hashes.model_not_executed_reason: S04 whole-stage review validates infrastructure, edge, release and capacity contracts offline; it executes no model, provider, host, account, container engine, systemd, browser, traffic, order or return evaluation.

detail.verification_boundary: LOCAL_OWNER_SUPPLIED_ARCHIVE_RECEIPT; CI verifies pinned critical repository files, not the absent ZIP

compose.image: ${ABD_IMAGE:?ABD_IMAGE must be pinned by sha256 digest}
${ABD_IMAGE:?ABD_IMAGE must be pinned by sha256 digest}

detail.goal: 在VPS-1资源和A$0新增预算内实现全天候分析、全球中文访问和可恢复发布。

phases.objective: 声明OVH主机、系统服务、容器、目录、秘密和资源限制。
phases.pass_gate: 一条命令可重建，秘密不进入仓库。
phases.title: 基础设施即代码

phases.objective: 建立身份保护、Named Tunnel、中文降级页和最小暴露面。
phases.pass_gate: OVH无需公开业务入站端口即可访问。
phases.title: Cloudflare 全球入口

phases.objective: 建立同机双环境切换、小流量试运行、功能开关和自动回滚。
phases.pass_gate: 发布不丢账本，失败在15分钟内回旧版。
phases.title: 单机双环境发布

phases.objective: 建立CPU、内存、磁盘、浏览器并发和保留期预算。
phases.pass_gate: VPS-1在10倍预期负载下不触发失控交换或磁盘耗尽。
phases.title: 容量与资源治理

detail.rollback: 关闭对应功能开关，恢复上一已签名制品，保留不可变证据并重放派生状态。
stop_conditions: 发现法律、监管或来源合同实质冲突且无安全默认
严重安全事故或证据完整性失败
detail.title: OVH 7×24 与全球访问架构

product.name_zh: 全天候投注决策辅助系统
product.primary_goal: 在不降低证据、风险、安全与合规门槛的前提下，分析全部可观察市场并追求 A$300×1.3^n 的月度滚动复利目标。

falsification_gate: 月收益率的95%上界仍低于30%
plausible_gate: 保守月度对数增长中位数 >= ln(1.3)
月度对数增长第5百分位 > 0
按来源、平台限额、机会数量和相关性校正后的容量通过
verification_gate: 按现金流调整后的月度几何收益 >= 30%

index.pass_gate: 所有发现对象都有唯一类型或明确未知状态。
任何采集能力必须先通过来源合同。
固定时钟测试中刷新偏差≤2秒，过期数据不进入建议。
静默缺口=0；每个缺口都有原因和恢复动作。
